title: cotyledon orbiculata var. oblonga
intro: Cotyledon orbiculata var. oblonga, also known as the heart-leaved stoneplant or heart-leaved false aloe, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cotyledon orbiculata var. oblonga include its potential to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations, as well as its use in relieving stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
